steps.title: Include both collection dates
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize when Martinez collected both samples. The relevant notes give one date for Trixis antimenorrhoea and one date for Stephanomeria thurberi, so both specimens and both dates are needed.

steps.title: Reject incomplete timing
steps.content: Choice A discusses where samples can now be viewed. Choice B emphasizes family and geography, not dates. Choice C gives only the date for Trixis antimenorrhoea and omits the other specimen's timing. The answer is D.
